'''Chreev''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] who took the position [[Shoon-mi Esh]] held after his attempted [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]].
